ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regulatory_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory entry */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit that generated the entry */,
  "golden" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the entry is golden */,
  "unit_state" TEXT /* State of the entry (e.g., finalized) */,
  "trusted_judgments" INTEGER /* Number of trusted judgments made on the entry */,
  "last_judgment_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last judgment made on the entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the entry (e.g., Information) */,
  "category_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level in the category assigned */,
  "category_gold" TEXT /* Gold standard category reference */,
  "screenname" TEXT /* Screen name of the person or entity making the entry */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the regulatory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the regulatory entry was last updated */,
  "entry_source" TEXT /* Source of the regulatory entry (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "entry_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the regulatory entry */,
  "related_entries" TEXT /* IDs of related regulatory entries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_entries_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Compliance, Finance) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the unit */,
  "unit_head" TEXT /* Name of the unit head */,
  "unit_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent unit (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_unit_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_parent_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judgments" (
  "judgment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judgment record */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated regulatory entry */,
  "judgment_date" TEXT /* Date when the judgment was made */,
  "judgment_result" TEXT /* Result of the judgment (e.g., trusted, untrusted) */,
  "judgment_by" TEXT /* User who made the judgment */,
  "judgment_comments" TEXT /* Comments or justifications for the judgment */,
  "judgment_score" INTEGER /* Score or rating assigned to the judgment */,
  "judgment_category" TEXT /* Category of the judgment (e.g., trusted, untrusted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judgment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judgments_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES regulatory_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "category_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_category_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_parent_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compliance officer, analyst, executive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the entry */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device or browser used to access the entry */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES regulatory_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., regulatory change notification) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "alert_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "alert_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., compliance, summary) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "source_api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, webhook) */,
  "integration_config" TEXT /* Configuration details for the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
